test.name: Verify Fixed Agreement Delete Functionality

kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.msg: Capture Page Screenshot will be run on failure.
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to execute, when a SeleniumLibrary keyword fails.

kw.name: Setup ChromeDriver Path
Get Environment Variable
kw.doc: Returns the value of an environment variable with the given name.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: Bypassing local driver, relying on system PATH.
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Normalize Path
kw.doc: Normalizes the given path.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: ⚠ Bundled driver not found at ${local_driver}. Falling back to system PATH.
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Dynamically determines the correct ChromeDriver path. Returns the path to the bundled Mac driver if running locally, otherwise returns None to rely on the system PATH (CI).

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: exexcutable_path is being deprecated. Please use service to configure the driver's executable_path as per documentation.
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Force User Language To English
kw.msg: Successfully forced language to English for erpadmin@finalisten.se
kw.doc: Directly updates the language_setting in the database for the given email.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: return document.readyState === 'complete' Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[@type='submit' and contains(@class,'btn-primary') and contains(@class,'btn-block')]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: return document.readyState === 'complete' Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: Register menu not visible, trying fallback approaches...
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: var el = document.getElementById('register'); if(el) el.scrollIntoView({behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center'});
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.arg: var el = document.getElementById('production'); if(el) el.scrollIntoView({behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center'});

Wait Until Element Is Visible

kw.name: Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: arguments[0].scrollIntoView({behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center'}); By using argument: '<selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="cc845644a8f33cdc5d26f2e5bf10c210", element="f.F170B2FBB863892DDAFBC93FDC52F0E2.d.A4FA09A39B5A0307294064DC0234AC95.e.94")>'

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Double Click Element
kw.doc: Double clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Failed to find project records on the project list page (${PROJECT_LIST_URL}).
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Location
kw.doc: Returns the current browser window URL.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: \nCreating a test fixed agreement for project ID ${project_id} via DB...
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Create Fixed Agreement
kw.msg: Successfully created fixed agreement 3422 for project 1069
kw.doc: Creates a fixed agreement for a given project directly in the DB.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.arg: Failed to create fixed agreement in DB.
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Reload Page
kw.doc: Simulates user reloading page.

kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${delete_btn_locator} = xpath=//tr[td[contains(., 'Auto Test Agreement')]]//button[contains(@id, 'fixed_agreement_remove') or contains(@title, 'Delete') or contains(@title, 'Ta bort')]
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath=//tr[td[contains(., 'Auto Test Agreement')]]'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: ⚠ Row for 'Auto Test Agreement' not found in DOM!
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Fixed agreement row not found in DOM after creation.
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Handles the current alert and returns its message.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

Element Should Be Visible

kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.doc: Simulates user reloading page.

kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Page should have contained element 'xpath=//tr[td[contains(., 'Auto Test Agreement')]]' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
kw.status: Page should have contained element 'xpath=//tr[td[contains(., 'Auto Test Agreement')]]' but did not.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: ❌ Failure: Fixed agreement still found in DOM!
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: The fixed agreement row was NOT deleted.
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: ✓ Fixed agreement row successfully deleted and verified from server.
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Get Browser Ids
kw.doc: Returns index of all active browser as list.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.doc: Verifies that a fixed agreement row can be successfully deleted from the project edit page.

errors.msg: exexcutable_path is being deprecated. Please use service to configure the driver's executable_path as per documentation.
